description: You are a molecular biologist designing a targeted sequencing panel for multi-drug resistant tuberculosis (MDR-TB). Extract the katG gene (locus tag: Rv1908c) from the Mycobacterium tuberculosis H37Rv reference genome (~/UGENE_Data/mtb_h37rv.gb), including exactly 600 bp upstream of the start codon and 150 bp downstream of the stop codon. Ensure the extraction correctly accounts for the gene's strand orientation. Export the extracted sequence with its original annotations to ~/UGENE_Data/tb_resistance_panel/katG_locus.gb. Additionally, create a summary text report at ~/UGENE_Data/tb_resistance_panel/extraction_report.txt containing the strand ('+' or '-', or 'forward'/'reverse'), the original genomic coordinates of the katG CDS, and the total length of the extracted locus in base pairs.
